response.justification: Candidate brings strong polyglot engineering experience across web, embedded, and GIS domains, with notable open-source leadership via GISCollective and clear Linux/Python-adjacent depth. However, the role requires German C1 (candidate self-reports only Basic), explicit team leadership/management experience is limited, and UML/formal architecture credentials are not demonstrated. Worth a screening call to verify language level and leadership scope.
strengths: Broad senior engineering experience across multiple stacks and Linux/open-source projects
Founder of an open-source GIS platform demonstrating architecture and product ownership
Strong craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, mentoring via talks/courses)
concerns: German listed as Basic — fails the C1 minimum requirement
No formal Head-of-Development or people-management track record shown
UML and formal requirements-management expertise not evidenced in resume
